title: Algorithms Playground Kit
topic: Thinking in steps, constraints, and trade-offs
key_points: Clarify input/output before choosing an approach.
Compare brute force and optimized methods explicitly.
Use small examples to test edge cases first.
practice_prompts: Explain when a hash map helps reduce time complexity.
Give one edge case for binary search implementations.
Draft a mini lesson objective for greedy algorithms.
Describe one trade-off between readability and micro-optimization.
